name: CatalogReady AI
description: Evidence-grounded product listing, customer journey, claim audit, and AI visibility agent.

skills.name: Run product readiness agent
skills.description: Inspects supplied product HTML, plans fixes, asks for missing evidence, and validates reversible changes in memory.

skills.name: Audit product catalog
skills.description: Checks required feed fields and missing values.

skills.name: Audit product page evidence
skills.description: Checks supplied HTML for discovery readiness.

skills.name: Build visibility prompt pack
skills.description: Creates stable prompts for AI citation measurement.

skills.name: Score recorded AI visibility
skills.description: Measures citations, mentions, answer support, and competitor share of voice.

skills.name: Optimize product visibility
skills.description: Creates a shopping journey, listing draft, evidence audit, and readiness score.
